modifier.fantasyconstruct.fe_damage.flav: Attacks with the power of [Fantasy] can effectively reduce the enemy's health
modifier.fantasyconstruct.fade_power.fla: Attacks with the power of [Fade] can reduce the enemy's maximum health
modifier.fantasyconstruct.runic_shield.f: If all armor is imbued with Runic Shield, the [Fantasy Ending Shield] will protect you
modifier.fantasyconstruct.last_stand.fla: If all your armor is imbued with Last Stand, you will have an [Unwavering Resolve] in your heart
